_comment_about_this_file: Template openclaw.json for a fresh OpenClaw deployment. Replace <PLACEHOLDERS>, push to ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json on the VPS, restart gateway. Verify schema against your installed OpenClaw version before pushing — schema can change between releases.

<AGENT_NAME>._comment: Replace <AGENT_NAME> with a slug like 'rfi_triager'. Replace channel ID. Add more agents below by duplicating this block.
